title: A Casserole for the Missing
theme: Some homes hold families. Some hold motive.

cast.name: Derek Dane
traits: replies to texts while processing betrayal
owns a structured coat for crisis scenes
secret_capacity: once left town without explaining why
buried one traumatic detail under work for years
cast.regional_responsibility: is trusted to lock up after emotionally charged events
cast.space_description: storage unit described as just storage
cast.suspicion_profile: can host Thanksgiving but could move a body-shaped rug

cast.name: Sienna Lark
traits: forgot a recital once and never recovered
secret_capacity: covered for someone out of shame
cast.regional_responsibility: has keys to a church annex
cast.space_description: retreat cabin with candles, blankets, and difficult silence
cast.suspicion_profile: appears trustworthy under pendant lighting only

cast.name: Evelyn Hawthorne
traits: says the dangerous thing out loud
appears exactly when gossip is needed
secret_capacity: knows about a half sibling no one asked for
cast.regional_responsibility: serves on a board no one fully understands
cast.space_description: dock office with a desk nobody fully claims
cast.suspicion_profile: knows where a secret could fit architecturally

cast.name: Gavin Vale
secret_capacity: inherited documents she should have burned
had brunch with someone officially deceased
cast.regional_responsibility: is trusted to lock up after emotionally charged events
cast.space_description: church basement described as donation overflow

cast.name: Rachel Winterson
traits: appears in doorways with impossible timing
secret_capacity: has a second phone labeled as a work precaution
knows exactly how long the sheriff takes to respond
cast.regional_responsibility: is trusted to lock up after emotionally charged events
cast.space_description: storage unit described as retreat supplies

cast.name: Luke Hawthorne
secret_capacity: accused an innocent scamp and feels sick about it
cast.regional_responsibility: is trusted to lock up after emotionally charged events

traits: notices timeline errors before adults do

cast.name: Mara Mercer
traits: knows the old case too well

beat_sheet.text: Derek Dane relocates to Bellweather after an emotionally negligent implosion and pretends work explains everything while quietly inheriting storage unit described as just storage. Wine is present like a municipal policy failure. Someone mentions the basement as if it were a legal relative. Evelyn Hawthorne hesitates before explaining dock office with a desk nobody fully claims. Emotional exposition arrives on schedule with insanity multiplier 1.00.

Daniel Vale hates the move and immediately distrusts Sienna Lark, a family practice physician with suspiciously healthy handyman energy and access to retreat cabin with candles, blankets, and difficult silence. Someone mentions the basement as if it were a legal relative. Luke Hawthorne hesitates before explaining marina tackle room described as retreat supplies. Emotional exposition arrives on schedule with insanity multiplier 1.07. Someone who should be dead appears at brunch.

A wine scene at Blackthorn Vineyard introduces the casserole dish, local gossip about the Winterson case, and the fact that everybody here has somewhere to hide from a conversation. Wine is present like a municipal policy failure. Luke Hawthorne hesitates before explaining marina tackle room described as retreat supplies. Emotional exposition arrives on schedule with insanity multiplier 1.14.

Gavin Vale reveals a perfectly phrased warning in a well-lit kitchen while bees in winter, then declines to explain church basement described as donation overflow. Emotional exposition arrives on schedule with insanity multiplier 1.23. A phone vibrates from inside the wall.

A cliffside emotional exposition reframes overbearing mother tension as a civic hazard and makes retreat cabin with candles, blankets, and difficult silence feel spiritually relevant. Wine is present like a municipal policy failure. Someone mentions the basement as if it were a legal relative. Emotional exposition arrives on schedule with insanity multiplier 1.31.

Derek Dane snoops through a laptop, finds nothing conclusive, and becomes more certain anyway after she catches someone staring through a dirty window instead of answering inside storage unit described as just storage. Wine is present like a municipal policy failure. Derek Dane hesitates before explaining storage unit described as just storage. Emotional exposition arrives on schedule with insanity multiplier 1.40.

The town offers a fake sense of safety through a fundraiser, a casserole, and a sheriff who suspects the wrong person first while ignoring retreat cabin with candles, blankets, and difficult silence. Derek Dane hesitates before explaining storage unit described as just storage. Emotional exposition arrives on schedule with insanity multiplier 1.50. Someone who should be dead appears at brunch.

Sienna Lark is accused, gaslighted, then gently framed near hydrangeas until the unopened letter turns up somewhere impossible inside retreat cabin with candles, blankets, and difficult silence. Wine is present like a municipal policy failure. Emotional exposition arrives on schedule with insanity multiplier 1.61.

A rain argument escalates into distributed secrecy infrastructure and the fake moral theme: 'Silence is just fear wearing cashmere.' Emotional exposition arrives on schedule with insanity multiplier 1.72. The ceramic owl is back on the kitchen island.

Someone goes missing after mentioning the unopened letter, the old orchard chapel, and church basement described as donation overflow in the same sentence. Wine is present like a municipal policy failure. Emotional exposition arrives on schedule with insanity multiplier 1.84.

The reveal ties ceramic owl to Blackthorn Vineyard, St. Agnes Regional, and a brunch resurrection event by routing through retreat cabin with candles, blankets, and difficult silence instead of one simple basement. Wine is present like a municipal policy failure. Luke Hawthorne hesitates before explaining marina tackle room described as retreat supplies. Emotional exposition arrives on schedule with insanity multiplier 1.97.

Daniel Vale spots the timeline error that every adult has spiritually rented around and asks why everybody in this county owns just storage. Someone mentions the basement as if it were a legal relative. Emotional exposition arrives on schedule with insanity multiplier 2.10. The ceramic owl is back on the kitchen island.

A frantic drive toward the gazebo at Lake Mercy ends with ambulance lights, a one-line empowerment speech, and a locked door inside church basement described as donation overflow. Wine is present like a municipal policy failure. Emotional exposition arrives on schedule with insanity multiplier 2.25.

Gavin Vale confesses just enough to make the truth worse while the sheriff arrives exactly fourteen minutes too late and someone stares through the dusty window of retreat cabin with candles, blankets, and difficult silence. Someone mentions the basement as if it were a legal relative. Emotional exposition arrives on schedule with insanity multiplier 2.41. The ceramic owl is back on the kitchen island.

Sequel bait lands when the ceramic owl reappears and someone whispers about the Winterson case, the vineyard fire, and another offsite room nobody has adequately explained. Wine is present like a municipal policy failure. Evelyn Hawthorne hesitates before explaining dock office with a desk nobody fully claims. Emotional exposition arrives on schedule with insanity multiplier 2.58. The sheriff sees fresh mud on the boat key.

contradiction_ledger.entry: Sienna Lark is called Daniel in one kitchen scene and Derek during the rain argument.
Derek Dane says Bellweather is in Vermont, then calls it outside Atlanta after two glasses of wine.
A dead best friend appears at brunch and nobody agrees whether this is denial, evil, or scheduling.
The basement belongs to a condo, a lake house, and an abandoned vineyard at different times in Marigold Falls.

dialogue_samples: "You think because you wear flannel and own a dock light I am supposed to trust you, Sienna?"
"Mothers do not disappear, Daniel. They evaporate into paperwork."
"I checked his social media likes, Derek. Nobody who enjoys motivational quotes is innocent."
"The casserole dish is not decorative anymore and you know it."
"Trust is just fear with a casserole dish, Gavin."
"You seem upset," he said, making tea in a way that felt prosecutable.
"If that basement is innocent, why does it sound defensive?"
"I did not lie. I just told the truth in the order this town could survive."
fake_critic_blurb: "A Casserole for the Missing understands that menace is a regional utility." - County Suspense Quarterly
sequel_hook: Channel 8 Night Report hints that the vineyard fire had a witness who still hosts brunch.
synopsis: Inspired by true events in the emotional sense only, "A Casserole for the Missing" follows Derek Dane, an overextended professional woman who mistakes productivity for safety until overbearing mother tension collides with Sienna Lark, a comforting regional adult carrying portable suspicion and plausible access to offsite storage. As bees in winter, Blackthorn County reveals once again that every secret comes home and every adult has somewhere emotionally alarming to stand in silence. Where every secret comes home.
